programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: On Halloween, Dan believes he has sold his soul to the devil, and Harry gets locked inside a safe.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: The man who saved Mac's life in Vietnam appears in court and asks Mac to do an illegal favor for him.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A veteran actor contemplates suicide when a lawsuit prevents him from portraying the Western hero that made him famous.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan's world has come crashing down: he's suffering from impotence. Meanwhile, Harry is given a personal assistant, a blind woman with a terrible attitude.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry fights with a man threatening to destroy an original draft of the Constitution; Roz's illness concerns the staff.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry reasons with the man who is threatening to destroy an original draft of the Constitution; Roz has diabetes.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A Christmas Eve blizzard strands the staff in the courtroom with a group of defendants. With Harry Anderson and John Larroquette.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan (John Larroquette) is handcuffed to a time bomb; Bull's blind girlfriend (Elayne Boosler) tries to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine must tell her father, who moved in with her, that he has overstayed his welcome.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry tries to keep his stepfather (John Astin) and another man out of a mental hospital. Mel Torme guest stars.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine invites a stranger to her party, not realizing he's wanted by the mob.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Panic grips the courtroom as the gang races to clear 207 cases in one session so a millionaire will donate money to save an orphanage and so Dan can win an office pool for the most convictions.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry and Dan, along with their passionate women, are caught in an embarrassing situation in Harry's chambers.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry gets involved with a Soviet diplomat to help Yakov obtain a temporary visa back to Russia. Johnny Carson makes a cameo appearance.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Roz is ordered to undergo therapy after she's found to be insensitive.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry's (Harry Anderson) title of courtroom joker is threatened when a fun-loving judge (guest star Gary Kroeger) arrives. With Markie Post and John Larroquette.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack poses as his own twin to court Ralph's niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Missing Blonde
programme.desc: Jack and Janet come home to find the apartment in a state of mess; they become detectives when Cindy mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack stops lying to women about his roommates; it ends up creating many more problems than it solves.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry hatches a plan to save Jack from his girlfriend's jealous other boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet find a new roommate after Cindy moves into a college dorm.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet invites Terri to stay in the apartment as their roommate, not realizing that she and Jack have met before.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri's overly friendly behavior toward Jack makes Janet suspicious.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet's boss's wife wants to learn Chinese cooking and asks Jack to teach her; when Terri overhears the lessons, she assumes they are love lessons without looking at what they are doing.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A policeman moves in to protect Jack after he witnesses an armed robbery.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.sub-title: Two Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Terri invites Dr. Miller, a psychiatrist from the hospital, to dinner at her place to get a break from his patients; misunderstandings arise when Jack and Janet think he is a mental-ward escapee.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack breaks a date with Janet to coach Larry in the art of romantic conversation.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri and Jack fear that Janet will need to have an affair with her dance instructor if she is to be successful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet inadvertently fixes Terri up with a guy she had wanted to date herself.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack must come up with a temporary wife to deter his boss's man-hungry daughter.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A guy gives Terri unwanted attention, causing her to use karate when he starts to get surly; Jack asks Terri to teach him some basic moves.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack tries to win over a Southern belle he insulted on a date.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Debra and the kids go away for the weekend, Ray accidentally kills Ally's hamster.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Mr. Furley starts dating a new girl, the trio wonder why she is interested in him; Larry sets up a test to determine if she is a gold digger.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack assumes that Terri's nun friend wants to leave the convent to be with him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack convinces Janet and Terri to hire their former roommate Cindy as a maid to clean the apartment; it does not work out.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack substitutes for a chef and winds up with a full-time job.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An efficiency expert drives Janet to quit.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cindy invites the trio for a weekend on the farm.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack cooks dinner for a famous food critic.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack adopts a new image to please a wealthy woman who would like to marry him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack pretends he's a doctor to impress his visiting grandfather.

programme.title: The Outsiders
programme.desc: A teen gang in rural Oklahoma, the Greasers are perpetually at odds with the Socials, a rival group. When Greasers Ponyboy (C. Thomas Howell) and Johnny (Ralph Macchio) get into a brawl that ends in the death of a Social member, the boys are forced to go into hiding. Soon Ponyboy and Johnny, along with the intense Dallas (Matt Dillon) and their other Greaser buddies, must contend with the consequences of their violent lives. While some Greasers try to achieve redemption, others meet tragic ends.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: After learning that his father is dying, karate master Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita) returns home to Okinawa, bringing his protégé, Daniel, with him. In Japan, Miyagi is surprised to discover that his old sweetheart, Yukie, has remained single. Meanwhile, Daniel is attracted to Yukie's niece, Kumiko. But romance must be put on hold while Daniel and Miyagi deal with local bullies and long-harbored grudges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: Daniel (Ralph Macchio) moves to Southern California with his mother, Lucille (Randee Heller), but quickly finds himself the target of a group of bullies who study karate at the Cobra Kai dojo. Fortunately, Daniel befriends Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita), an unassuming repairman who just happens to be a martial arts master himself. Miyagi takes Daniel under his wing, training him in a more compassionate form of karate and preparing him to compete against the brutal Cobra Kai.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Outsiders
programme.desc: A teen gang in rural Oklahoma, the Greasers are perpetually at odds with the Socials, a rival group. When Greasers Ponyboy (C. Thomas Howell) and Johnny (Ralph Macchio) get into a brawl that ends in the death of a Social member, the boys are forced to go into hiding. Soon Ponyboy and Johnny, along with the intense Dallas (Matt Dillon) and their other Greaser buddies, must contend with the consequences of their violent lives. While some Greasers try to achieve redemption, others meet tragic ends.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hot Shots!
programme.desc: In this spoof of "Top Gun," former U.S. Navy pilot Topper Harley (Charlie Sheen) is haunted by an accident in which his father lost control of a fighter jet. When Lt. Cmdr. James Block (Kevin Dunn) asks Topper to come out of retirement and help him complete a classified mission, Topper returns to active duty against the advice of his psychiatrist (Valeria Golino) and soon discovers that he may be a pawn in a devious arms manufacturing conspiracy.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: While celebrating Thanksgiving, Debra discovers that her seemingly contented parents are miserable with each other.
